title: 10 best herbal creams for post nasal drip
description: Highbush cranberry creams helps with post nasal drip because of their unique combination of soothing and anti-inflammatory properties. The extract from highbush cranberries contains potent compounds that help to reduce swelling in the nasal passages, allowing mucus to drain more easily and alleviating congestion.
